hero.title: Building scalable and high-performance web applications
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Engineer focused on performance, architecture and user experience.

intro.title: About me
intro.p1: I'm Magaiver, a Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable and high-performance web applications.
intro.p2: I work end-to-end across frontend and backend, designing architectures, modeling databases, and delivering production-ready systems. My main stack includes Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Fastify, Express, PostgreSQL, and Prisma or Drizzle as ORM solutions.
intro.p3: I've built SaaS platforms, operational dashboards, and API-driven systems with a strong focus on performance, maintainability, and clean architecture.
intro.p4: I also integrate AI into products to enhance user experience and automate complex workflows.
intro.p5: My goal is to build systems that generate real business impact, combining technical quality, scalability, and user-focused solutions.

modal.overview: Built to deliver scalable architecture and high-performance UX.
modal.problem: Lack of real-time visibility and inefficient workflows.
modal.solution: Modern application with optimized performance and intuitive UI.
